steps.t: Saeradan is at Echad Saeradan in the Windfells of Enedwaith. You should speak with Saeradan regarding his plans for the items you collected.
The Algraig goatherds are at Gavar Cadlus, north-east of Echad Saeradan, along the foothills of the Misty Mountains. Saeradan asked you to deliver the…
